channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【February 2026 Insiders (version 1.110)】2026 年 2 月 Insider（版本 1.110）
item.description: 【Learn what is new in the Visual Studio Code February 2026 Release (1.110). Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 2026 年 2 月版本 (1.110) 中的新增功能。阅读全文

item.title: 【The Dongle Died at Midnight – WinForms Agent Saved my German Mom's Business Trip】加密狗半夜死机 – WinForms 代理拯救了我德国妈妈的商务旅行
item.description: 【An 82-year-old German industrial engineer, a 22-year-old UI framework, and an AI that finally understands WinForms Designer serialization walk into a hotel room at midnight. There's no punchline. Just a dead dongle and a dead ... line. Well, I admit, it's sort of hard to believe, but how these three are connected is really no joke. But let's c】一名 82 岁的德国工业工程师、一个 22 岁的 UI 框架和一个终于理解 WinForms Designer 序列化的 AI 于午夜走进酒店房间。没有什么亮点。只是一个死了的加密狗和一条死了的……线路。好吧，我承认，这有点难以置信，但这三者之间的联系确实不是开玩笑。但让我们

item.title: 【Visual Studio February Update】Visual Studio 二月更新
item.description: 【This month’s Visual Studio update continues our focus on helping you move faster and stay in flow, with practical improvements across AI assistance, debugging, testing, and modernization. Building on the momentum from January’s editor updates, the February release brings smarter diagnostics and targeted support for real world development s】本月的 Visual Studio 更新继续致力于帮助您更快地前进并保持流畅，并在 AI 辅助、调试、测试和现代化方面进行了实际改进。凭借一月份编辑器更新的势头，二月份的版本为现实世界的开发带来了更智能的诊断和有针对性的支持

item.title: 【Improved Python (PyPi/uvx) support in Azure MCP Server】改进了 Azure MCP 服务器中的 Python (PyPi/uvx) 支持
item.description: 【We're excited to announce improved Python support for the Azure Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server! Python developers can now install and run Azure MCP Server directly from PyPI using familiar tools like uvx and pip. Whether you're】我们很高兴地宣布改进了对 Azure 模型上下文协议 (MCP) 服务器的 Python 支持！ Python 开发人员现在可以使用 uvx 和 pip 等熟悉的工具直接从 PyPI 安装和运行 Azure MCP Server。无论你是

item.title: 【Customizing the ways the dialog manager dismisses itself: Isolating the Close pathway】自定义对话框管理器自行关闭的方式：隔离关闭路径
item.description: 【We started by exploring the signals the dialog manager uses for dismissing a dialog. Now we can use that information to customize the dismiss behavior. Let's start with a diagr】我们首先探索对话框管理器用于关闭对话框的信号。现在我们可以使用该信息来自定义关闭行为。让我们从一张图表开始

item.title: 【Use Windows on-device AI in your Electron app】在您的 Electron 应用程序中使用 Windows 设备上的 AI
item.description: 【Last year we published AI Dev Gallery, an open-source app full of interactive Windows AI examples. A common follow-up question from Electron developers has been: “How can we build similar on-device AI experiences in our Electron】去年，我们发布了 AI Dev Gallery，这是一款充满交互式 Windows AI 示例的开源应用程序。 Electron 开发人员常见的后续问题是：“我们如何在 Electron 中构建类似的设备上人工智能体验？

item.title: 【Customizing the ways the dialog manager dismisses itself: Detecting the ESC key, second (failed) attempt】自定义对话框管理器自行关闭的方式：检测 ESC 键，第二次（失败）尝试
item.description: 【Last time, we saw that Get­Async­Key­State is not the way to detect whether the ESC key was down at the time the current input】上次我们看到 GetAsyncKeyState 并不是检测当前输入时 ESC 键是否按下的方法

item.title: 【Light up Multiple Databases with a Single API with Data API builder's multi-source configuration】通过数据 API 构建器的多源配置，通过单个 API 点亮多个数据库
item.description: 【Data API builder (DAB) supports multi-source configurations Data API builder (DAB) connects to your database with a safe REST or GraphQL endpoint. But DAB is not limited to just one database. Using a multi-source configuration, you can connect to more than one database simultaneously. Learn more about Data A】数据 API 构建器 (DAB) 支持多源配置 数据 API 构建器 (DAB) 使用安全的 REST 或 GraphQL 端点连接到您的数据库。但 DAB 并不仅限于一种数据库。使用多源配置，您可以同时连接到多个数据库。了解有关数据 A 的更多信息

item.title: 【The 2026/2027 Seattle Symphony subscription season at a glance】2026/2027 西雅图交响乐团订阅季一览
【Customizing the ways the dialog manager dismisses itself: Detecting the ESC key, first (failed) attempt】自定义对话框管理器自行关闭的方式：检测 ESC 键，第一次（失败）尝试
item.description: 【Suppose you want to distinguish between dismissing a dialog by pressing ESC and dismissing a dialog by clicking the Close button. One suggestion I saw was to call Get­Async­Key­State(VK_ESCAPE) to check whether the ESC is down. In general, any time you see Get­Async­Key­St】假设您想要区分通过按 ESC 关闭对话框和通过单击“关闭”按钮关闭对话框。我看到的一个建议是调用 GetAsyncKeyState(VK_ESCAPE) 来检查 ESC 是否已关闭。一般来说，任何时候您看到 GetAsyncKeySt
